items.name_en: LвКЪвДЃwвДЃрЯМЯ New ArrivalрЯЖХ Mini Nappa Leather Flamenco Purse Clutch features a drawstring closure with a signature twisted knot. The Flamenco Purse is cleverly redesigned with a soft, sensual drape created by delicate knots and a ruffled top. This version is crafted from soft Nappa leather. The bag is part of the Jade Jade collection, featuring a matching lucky jade stone in the interior. *Crossbody or shoulder carry* Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap *Subtle magnetic closure *Suede lining LвКЪвДЃwвДЃ Gold Foil.

items.name_en: Bestseller Gate Saddle Bag
items.name_cn:
Bestseller Gate Saddle Bag
рЯСЬThe bowрЯОА is not just decoration, but the only opening for the flap. The bag features only one brass bullet buckle with a delicate brand logo, no other hardware. It embodies high-end Western European traditional leather craftsmanship and design style. So it is lightweight, and the strap is adjustable in length, suitable for any height. This is very niceрЯТГрЯТГ
рЯСЙSmall Size:20*19*11.5cm. The body is very flexible calfskin with two compartments and a card slot. Fits a short wallet, phone, lipstickрЯТД, compact, etc. The capacity is very impressiveрЯШЗ. You can even bring a KindleрЯШНрЯШН10183#(Plain: Caramel/White)рЯШШ Comes with box

items.name_en: LOвДЃwвДЃрЯМЯ Mini Soft Nappa Leather Flamenco Purse. Features a ruffled design with key details like the signature knot on the side. Stylish and versatile, it can be carried as a clutch, worn with the donut chain strap, or slung over the shoulder with the leather strap. This version is made of soft Nappa leather. Stylish and versatile, it can be carried as a clutch, worn with the donut chain strap, or slung over the shoulder with the leather strap. This version is made of soft Nappa leather. Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Removable and adjustable leather strap* Removable donut chain charm* Anagram embossed pebbled leather* Discreet magnetic closure* Suede lining, gold or silver foil stamping*(Matching metal chain extension leather shoulder strap)
Model: 412342
Size: 23*17*5.5CM
